newsitems.title: Persona 6 Wishlist is Now Open!
newsitems.author: ATLUS West
newsitems.contents: [p]Wish listing for Persona 6 is officially open![/p][p][/p][p]While staying true to the distinctive atmosphere and innovative gameplay experience that have made the series beloved for years, Persona 6 introduces an entirely new setting and story. [/p][p]Each mainline title features a self-contained narrative with no story ties to previous games — so if this is your first Persona experience, jump right in![/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42950193/b917af79a607e7a2c20d9208d0ddb41a1fee3324.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]Check out the Teaser Trailer![/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/CL-q0HgfMOY?si=E8H0XGLk608c-uwn"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][u]About the Persona Series[/u][/p][p]■A Legacy of Over 30 Years[/p][p]The Persona series is one of Atlus's flagship RPG franchises. Born as a spin-off of the Shin Megami Tensei series, it began with the release of Revelations: Persona in 1996 and has continued to captivate players for over 30 years.[/p][p] [/p][p]■Harness the Power of Persona and the Bonds You Share[/p][p]Those who awaken to their "Persona" - a manifestation of their inner self - come together, forge deep bonds, and grow through countless trials and hardships.[/p][p] [/p][p]■Live a Year Alongside Unforgettable Companions in Modern-Day Japan[/p][p]Set against the backdrop of contemporary Japanese cities, the series follows young men and women navigating the everyday experiences of school life, friendship, and romance — while confronting occult mysteries rooted in strange rumors and urban legends.[/p][p] [/p][p]Wishlist Now![/p][p]©ATLUS. ©SEGA.[/p]

newsitems.title: Persona 4 Revival launches February 18, 2027 – Pre-order Available Now!
newsitems.author: ATLUS West
newsitems.contents: [p]Hello Investigation Teams, [/p][p]We’re thrilled to announce that [b]pre-orders for [i]Persona 4 Revival[/i][/b] are officially live! Whether you’re returning to reach out to the truth once more or stepping into this unforgettable journey for the first time, now is your chance to experience a beloved classic reborn. [/p][p] [/p][p align="center"][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45703712/72e600eda74bf7ce4190d5f175eb53602efa5c54.jpg"][/img] [/p][p][b]Watch the new Pre-order Trailer![/b] [/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/1osdiOAkBKc"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][b]Who’s on Air?[/b]  Legend has it that a mysterious broadcast known as the “Midnight Channel” appears only on rainy nights. The day after it airs, a corpse is found in Inaba, a quiet and peaceful town in rural Japan suddenly thrown into turmoil. [/p][p]To uncover the truth behind these chilling mysteries, you and your friends form an investigation team to unravel the secrets of the Midnight Channel and the bizarre murders. As your adventure unfolds, you face off against “Shadows,” eerie manifestations of individuals’ darker selves. Together, you awaken a hidden power called “Persona” and embark on a journey to prevent more tragedies while uncovering the truth behind the chaos. [/p][p] [/p][p][b]Key Features[/b] [/p][p][b]■ Discover the Thrilling Midnight Channel[/b]  Immerse yourself in a dual-layered narrative set in the peaceful yet unsettling town of Inaba. Investigate supernatural occurrences, solve murders, and unravel the secrets of the Midnight Channel alongside your teammates in a story-driven gameplay experience. [/p][p][b]■ Exhilarating Turn-Based Battles[/b]  Exploit enemy weaknesses, unleash powerful “All-Out Attacks,” and master the strategic use of Personas to overcome formidable foes. Acquire or fuse new Personas and develop your unique battle style as you uncover the secrets behind the Midnight Channel. [/p][p][b]■ Shape Your Year and Your Destiny[/b]  Immerse yourself in the life of a teenager, where every day is filled with new choices. Balance sports, part-time jobs, school life, and friendships, all while preparing to confront the mysteries of the Midnight Channel. Every decision you make shapes your journey, leading to unique and unforgettable experiences and endings. [/p][p][b]■ Anime Cutscenes & Memorable Characters[/b]  Experience beautifully updated anime-style and 3D cutscenes and strengthen bonds with irreplaceable characters. Every heartfelt connection impacts your journey and shapes the story. [/p][p][b]■ A Beloved Remake for Fans and Newcomers[/b]  Rediscover the iconic Persona adventure with enhanced visuals, improved gameplay, modern aesthetics, and exciting new quality-of-life updates that bring the classic to life like never before. [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45703712/38ca219048e780e37af31d1348c441dd5fce26a6.png"][/img][/p][p] [/p][p][b]Pre-Order Bonus[/b] [/p][p]Pre-order now and receive exclusive bonuses that will elevate your Persona 4 Revival experience! [/p][p][b]Persona 4 Revival: P3R & P5R Extra BGM Set[/b] [/p][p][b]P3R Extra BGMs include:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Dungeon BGM: Basement (P3R ver.) [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Boss Battle BGM: Heartful Cry [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Result BGM: After the Battle (P3R ver.) [/p][/*][/list][p][b]P5R Extra  BGMs include:[/b] [/p][list][*][p]Dungeon BGM: The Whims of Fate [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Normal Battle BGM: Will Power [/p][/*][/list][list][*][p]Result BGM: Triumph [/p][/*][/list][p][i]This add-on is available to those who pre-order by February 17, 2027 @ 23:59.[/i]  [i]A separately sold base game is required to access the bonus content. Please ensure the game is updated to the latest patch if applicable.[/i]  [i]Note: Some overlapping content may occur.[/i] [/p][p] [/p][p]Return to the quiet town of Inaba—where peaceful days hide something far more unsettling beneath the surface. [/p][p]Whether you’re returning to Inaba or stepping into this story for the first time, we’re excited to have you join the investigation. [/p][p] [/p][p][b]Pre-order now![/b] [/p][p]©ATLUS. ©SEGA.[/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/2963950/Persona_4_Revival/"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][/p]

newsitems.title: Get 80% Off Persona 5 Royal During the SEGA/ATLUS Golden Week Sale!
newsitems.author: ATLUS West
newsitems.contents: [p]Share this with a friend who hasn’t played yet! There’s no better time than now to play one of the most celebrated JRPGs of all time.[/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/1687950/Persona_5_Royal/"][/dynamiclink][/p][p]Discover even more games in the Persona universe on sale: [url="https://store.steampowered.com/publisher/Sega/sale/P30"]https://store.steampowered.com/publisher/Sega/sale/P30[/url][/p][p][/p][p]Don’t forget to check out all the other hot deals from the SEGA/ATLUS family, with up to 75% savings on your favorite titles![/p][p][url="https://store.steampowered.com/publisher/Sega/sale/SEGAGoldenWeekSale2026"]https://store.steampowered.com/publisher/Sega/sale/SEGAGoldenWeekSale2026[/url][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42950193/c3aeda648772c5ad5cb4a87870053176da37787b.jpg"][/img][/p]

newsitems.title: ATLUS Game-Themed Avatar Frames Now Available In Persona 5: The Phantom X!
newsitems.author: ATLUS West
newsitems.contents: [p]Blooming deals await at the SEGA Steam Spring Sale![/p][p]Sale Period: 19 March, 2026, 5:00 PM - 26 March, 2026, 4:59 PM. (UTC)[/p][p][/p][p]Don't miss this chance to save 50% on Metaphor: ReFantazio, up to 60% on Persona 3 Reload, or 70% on Persona 5 Royal![/p][p]Celebrate the sale with exclusive limited-time avatar frames featuring Metaphor: ReFantazio, Persona 3 Reload, and Persona 5 Royal – now available for download in Persona 5: The Phantom X![/p][p]Head to Persona 5: The Phantom X for the SEGA Steam Spring Sale Exclusive ATLUS Game-Themed Avatar Frames Giveaway*[/p][p][/p][p]◆SEGA Steam Spring Sale Exclusive ATLUS Game-Themed Avatar Frames Giveaway*[/p][p]Claim by: 2 April, 2026 1:59AM (UTC)[/p][p]Contents:[/p][p]Limited-Time Metaphor: ReFantazio Avatar Frame - Hero's Awakening[/p][p]Limited-Time Persona 3 Reload Avatar Frame - Evoked Awakening[/p][p]Limited-Time Persona 5 Royal Avatar Frame - Mask of Faith[/p][p][i]*no purchase required to claim gifts[/i][/p][p][/p][p][u][b]◆ Persona5: The Phantom X[/b][/u] [/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42950193/f38facbcede6f9896dc4a95dffcdff546cb66da4.png"][/img][/p][p]Jump into the thrilling double life of a seemingly ordinary high school student in Tokyo. Make the most of student life in Japan by hitting the bustling cities of Shibuya, Shinjuku, and Kichijoji. Once the bell rings, don the mask of a Phantom Thief and infiltrate the hidden realm of the Metaverse to take on the dark beings that lie within... [/p]

newsitems.title: New Version of Persona5: The Phantom X Now Available
newsitems.author: P5X_EN
newsitems.contents: [p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/e64aa008d7ba4a2d21b5eb56f010917071a3cb1b.png"][/img][/p][p]SEGA Corporation has released Version 2.0 of Persona5: The Phantom X ("P5X"). To celebrate our first major update, we’re giving away items including Meta Jewels, which can be used for Contracts (gacha) and more.[/p][p] [/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/J-TPzn6V8Ow?si=mSsAsbwtI0Fo0eIe"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://youtu.be/Z1EGITqqK68?si=RMbwaCJpMu6ZdhzY"][/dynamiclink][/p][p]We've also got some brand-new promotional videos showing off the charm of this ultimate　school-life RPG. Take a look![/p][p] [/p][p][u][b]◆ Synopsis of Chapter 3: Unconditional Love[/b][/u][/p][p]“When did I abandon my true self?”[/p][p]The Protagonist has awakened the power of his other self, his Persona, and become a Phantom Thief.  He forms a band of Phantom Thieves who are also Persona users to save innocent people from evildoers who evade justice, stealing their distorted desires and changing their hearts.  As the Phantom Thieves grow increasingly famous among the public, a mysterious new teacher is appointed at the Protagonist’s school. The group remains on high alert as this figure lurks the school grounds and manipulates the students.  Meanwhile, Riko Tanemura of the Disciplinary Committee begins to notice the school's gradual distortions and questions what is truly happening...[/p][p] [img src="https://prcdn.freetls.fastly.net/release_image/5397/6758/5397-6758-2ec015b53ceebfadc55c7daa6403d03a-1500x844.jpg?width=1950&height=1350&quality=85%2C65&format=jpeg&auto=webp&fit=bounds&bg-color=fff"][/img][/p][p][img src="https://prcdn.freetls.fastly.net/release_image/5397/6758/5397-6758-c32be5d4351835a7948735e379a38078-1500x844.jpg?width=1950&height=1350&quality=85%2C65&format=jpeg&auto=webp&fit=bounds&bg-color=fff"][/img][/p][p][img src="https://prcdn.freetls.fastly.net/release_image/5397/6758/5397-6758-c5a0bb1f48e98fc7f998bf34b4c68205-1500x844.jpg?width=1950&height=1350&quality=85%2C65&format=jpeg&auto=webp&fit=bounds&bg-color=fff"][/img][/p][p][img src="https://prcdn.freetls.fastly.net/release_image/5397/6758/5397-6758-10ea6cecef485c1fd5f0d45c0fb28a89-1500x844.jpg?width=1950&height=1350&quality=85%2C65&format=jpeg&auto=webp&fit=bounds&bg-color=fff"][/img][/p][p][u][b]◆Special Website for Ver. 2.0 Now Live![/b][/u][/p][p]　The special site is jam-packed with information on exciting new content, including the latest addition to the Main Story and the new neighborhood, Kichijoji. That’s not all! Information about the “Real Kichijoji (Tokyo, Japan) Collabs” and other real-world events will be released on the site in the future. Give it a read now, and keep it bookmarked for future updates![/p][p] [/p][p][b]Ver.2.0 Special Site[/b] [/p][p][url="https://persona5x.com/lp/"]https://persona5x.com/lp/[/url][/p][p][/p][p][u][b]New version now available (with lots of loot to celebrate)![/b][/u][/p][p][b] [/b][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/a5b5efec9a3a5a461eafad22b7b84fd0fe2c3a71.png"][/img][/p][p]Log in to the game for 7 days by Oct 22, 2025 6:59 PM (PDT) to receive 20 Platinum Tickets (usable for certain Contracts/gacha) and 20 Platinum Milicoins (usable for certain Arms Deals). In addition, you’ll also receive 60 Phantom Thief Cognitite Shards, a new item that can Awaken 5★ Phantom Thieves such as Ren Amamiya, Yui, and Minami Miyashita, along with 1,000 Meta Jewels.[/p][p] [/p][p] [/p][p][u][b]◆Comeback: 5★ Phantom Thief Ren Amamiya Returns![/b][/u][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/e9a5ce898fe5ef44a1dd721abb608ede52fc2286.png"][/img]The 5★ Phantom Thief Ren Amamiya makes a Comeback to Most Wanted Phantom Idol Contracts: The Phantom Magician, and the Ren Amamiya-only 5★ weapon Phoenix Dagger will be featured again in Most Wanted for Arms Deals: Silent Pistol. Don’t miss this chance to recruit Ren Amamiya to your team![/p][p] [/p][p] [/p][p][u][b]◆Main Story Chapter 3: Unconditional Love Phase 1 released![/b][/u][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/1a5ed4dcb6d77944dfe62825f8185947cb647b57.jpg"][/img][/p][p][u][b]Main Story Chapter 3: Unconditional Love Synopsis[/b][/u][/p][p]At Kokatsu Academy, where the protagonist is enrolled, an educational consultant arrives with plans to reform the school’s policies.[/p][p]Advocating a modern sense of “righteousness,” the consultant sets about improving the academy, but over time, the relationship between teachers and students begins to warp, and the school slowly transforms into something unsettling.[/p][p]Riko Tanemura, an exceptional student and chair of the disciplinary committee, while being swept up in the “distortions born of righteousness” brought about by these reforms, gradually starts to perceive the strange changes taking hold.[/p][p] [/p][p]How will the protagonist, Riko, and their allies stand against the “false righteousness” of an enemy who no one else recognizes as evil...?[/p][p][b] [/b][/p][p][b]▼Riko Tanemura (Code name: Wind) joins the group in Chapter 3.[/b][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/9577400f0f7e4786e9cfbbb1756ba58f8d7b9e08.jpg"][/img][/p][p] A support character who acts as the party’s commander and strategist, leading them to land flashy All-Out Attacks.[/p][p]Even when not targeting an enemy’s Weakness, she can lower the enemy’s Down Points, and at the start of battle, she boosts the entire party’s HP, Attack, and Defense. She also possesses the ability to increase All-Out Attack damage by as much as 60%.[/p][p] [/p][p] [/p][p][b]▼Character Introduction Movie[/b][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gC8onJHoaEs"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][b]▼Character Skills Spotlight Movie[/b][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZVevRsWS_Zk"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][u][b]◆Chapter 3: Unconditional Love Release Event![/b][/u][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/071d8abd0a3df4a4a705c74b9bafd9cdd67ed394.png"][/img][/p][p]Play the new content added in Ver. 2.0 and complete goals to earn up to 1,280 Meta Jewels, as well as the event-exclusive item Mizuhiki Knots and other rewards. Collect Mizuhiki Knots to get the Riko Tanemura-only 4★ weapon Red Plum Blossom as well as the materials needed to fully upgrade it.[/p][p] [/p][p][b]Duration: Until 6:59 PM on Oct 22, 2025 (PDT)[/b][/p][p] [/p][p][u][b]◆Addition of Kichijoji Area[/b][/u]  [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/872d7760ab5fd7774a2018d9ab8b8f778c1eed7a.png"][/img][/p][p]A new area called Kichijoji has been added alongside Chapter 3 of the Main Story. This new area brings more ways to enjoy city life, such as new part-time jobs, as well as the chance to meet new characters and learn their stories.[/p][p][/p][p][u][b]◆New 5★ Phantom Thief: Ayaka Sakai![/b][/u][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/3b7a2d538f66babd416a67a65a093f5406de14ca.jpg"][/img][/p][p]The new 5 ★Phantom Thief Ayaka Sakai will be featured in Most Wanted Phantom Idol Contracts, where the appearance rate for certain Phantom Thieves is increased. An exclusive weapon can be obtained through Arms Deals: Silent Pistol.[/p][p] [/p][p][b]Most Wanted Phantom Idol Contracts: Dazzling Encore[/b][/p][p][b]Duration: Until 6:59 PM on Oct 8, 2025 (PDT)[/b][/p][p][b] [/b][/p][p][b]▼Most Wanted Phantom Thief: 5★ Ayaka Sakai (Code Name: Chord)[/b][/p][p]Specializing in single-target buffs, she can turn an ally into a Costar, granting them an attack power boost, as well as significantly strengthening that ally’s Highlight effect. She's able to instantly activate an ally's Highlight, ignoring the Highlight Gauge and cooldown times, and significantly increase the damage dealt by that Highlight.[/p][p]Plus, she can pump up the Gauge's fill rate, allowing Highlights to be activated at a quicker tempo.[/p][p] [/p][p] [/p][p][b]▼Character Introduction Movie[/b][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OtHae_5vj8k"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][b]▼Character Skills Spotlight Movie[/b][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pLdgp2uOp1g"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][b]▼Ayaka Sakai's Synergy Story added![/b]  [img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/78b3a94097f4abcb5a5aaf91ded8d1833e50d606.png"][/img][/p][p]The Synergy character interaction feature has been updated with a new story for Ayaka Sakai. Depending on your choices, you might even have a chance to date her! We hope you enjoy the story.[/p][p][b] [/b][/p][p][u][b]◆New Feature to Earn Items: Tasks[/b][/u][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45621326/eea0ae2ea1586362f94339fad8d2b70809cdae28.png"][/img][/p][p]Once your Player Level reaches 20, you’ll be able to use the Tasks feature, where you can send eligible allies to complete Tasks and receive rewards after a set amount of time. There are different types of requests, such as daily and weekly, with different time requirements and rewards. Use this feature to get Meta Jewels, Thief's Cognitite Shards, and maybe even something special from an exclusive Task... [/p][p][/p][p][b]Official Site:[/b] [/p][p][url="https://persona5x.com/"]https://persona5x.com/[/url][/p][p][b]Official X:[/b] [/p][p][url="https://x.com/P5XOfficialWest"]https://x.com/P5XOfficialWest[/url][/p][p][b]Official Instagram:[/b] [/p][p][url="https://www.instagram.com/P5XOfficialWest/"]https://www.instagram.com/P5XOfficialWest/[/url][/p][p][b]Official Facebook: [/b][/p][p][url="https://www.facebook.com/P5XOfficialWest"]https://www.facebook.com/P5XOfficialWest[/url][/p][p][b]Official YouTube: [/b][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://www.youtube.com/@P5XOfficialWest"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][b]Official Discord Server:[/b] [/p][p][url="https://discord.gg/cVDycxxmCK"]discord.gg/cVDycxxmCK[/url][/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/3061570"][/dynamiclink]🄫Perfect World Adapted from Persona5 🄫ATLUS. 🄫SEGA.[/p]
